name: Bolsover and Shuttlewood

locations.address:
Bolsover District Council,
Sherwood Lodge,
Bolsover,
Chestefield,

description:
This Safer Neighbourhood area covers Bolsover Town. It belongs to the North East Local Policing Unit.
 
Bolsover is a small market town with a strong mining and historical heritage. It is located within Bolsover District Council and is approximately 6 miles from Chesterfield town centre. Bolsover has many attractions from the 17th century including the castle and buildings which now make shops and businesses in the town centre. There are also long walks which show the history of the castle and the strong mining heritage that Bolsover possesses.
